untranslatable_reason: The signal requires pattern recognition for 'cup and handle' (identifying the right rim low of a specific candlestick pattern) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The entry condition 'price closes below the right rim low' requires explicit pattern detection not available in the indicator set. The exit condition describing a 'straight-line run to bottom' also requires pattern-based logic.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using price_pos_20 (20-period position) as a proxy for the 'right rim low' level, but this is NOT a true translation of the cup and handle pattern. True implementation requires pattern recognition algorithms. Exit uses sma_20 as a reversal threshold. Stop loss set to 2% as a conservative risk management measure per entry conditions.
